metadata.title: Engrave a governed memory artifact for finance operations within a European Union law firm, using the compiler_lens to resolve overbroad_one_pass_lock chaos input into a structured, validated SR8 directive.

mission.primary_objective: Engrave a governed memory artifact for finance operations within a European Union law firm, using the compiler_lens to resolve overbroad_one_pass_lock chaos input into a structured, validated SR8 directive.
mission.success_definition: Memory engrave artifact is produced with all required sections (objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, output contract).; Validation gates are present and testable for memory safety and overwrite policy.; Artifact passes SR8 compilation without errors.; Overbroad_one_pass_lock input is resolved into a governed structure without data loss or policy violation.

in_scope.item: Single memory engrave operation targeting finance_ops domain. Input is a messy, overbroad one-pass lock with missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria. Output must be a validated artifact with explicit gates for memory safety and overwrite policy compliance.

conflict_resolution.rule: SR8 canonical artifact fields override renderer defaults.
SRXML validation failures force blocked receipt state.

execution_contract.pipeline: raw_intent -> SR8 classification -> canonical artifact -> SRXML draft -> SRXML validation -> receipt

hard_constraints.item: Do not claim final sealed state from RC2 transform output.
Return blocked-state receipt when SR8 readiness is fail or intake is incomplete.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 1
gate.pass_condition: Memory engrave artifact is produced with all required sections (objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, output contract).

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 2
gate.pass_condition: Validation gates are present and testable for memory safety and overwrite policy.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 3
gate.pass_condition: Artifact passes SR8 compilation without errors.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 4
gate.pass_condition: Overbroad_one_pass_lock input is resolved into a governed structure without data loss or policy violation.

output_contract.completion_definition: Artifact parses as XML and passes SRXML RC2 static validation.

SRXML_Artifact.memory_subject: Engrave a governed memory artifact for finance operations within a European Union law firm, using the compiler_lens to resolve overbroad_one_pass_lock chaos input into a structured, validated SR8 directive.

memory_content.item: Single memory engrave operation targeting finance_ops domain. Input is a messy, overbroad one-pass lock with missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria. Output must be a validated artifact with explicit gates for memory safety and overwrite policy compliance.

SRXML_Artifact.overwrite_policy: Do not overwrite existing memory without approval.

verification_gate.item: Memory engrave artifact is produced with all required sections (objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, output contract).
Validation gates are present and testable for memory safety and overwrite policy.
Artifact passes SR8 compilation without errors.
Overbroad_one_pass_lock input is resolved into a governed structure without data loss or policy violation.

safety_limits.item: Must comply with EU data protection regulations (GDPR) and law firm confidentiality requirements.
Memory engrave must enforce overwrite policy: no destructive overwrite of existing critical memory without explicit validation gate approval.
All validation gates must be explicitly defined and logged.
The artifact must be SR8-compilable into objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract.
No hallucination or fabrication of missing context; use placeholder markers for unresolved inputs.

validation.minimum_pass_standard: SR8 canonical validation must be recorded and SRXML static validation must pass.

known_failure_modes.item: SR8 artifact classification cannot be represented by SRXML RC2.
SRXML static validation fails after rendering.

failure_handling.fallback_behavior: Return a blocked-state receipt and repair prompt instead of claiming executable success.
failure_handling.blocked_state: No blocked state recorded by SR8 at render time.

receipt.must_record: changed files, commands run, validation result, lineage
